hero.title: Stuck on I-40? We're 22 Minutes Away.

services.title: Flat Tire Change & Repair
services.shortDesc: Fast tire change or plug service anywhere on I-40, I-27, or in Amarillo.
services.longDesc: Need a flat tire change in Amarillo, TX? Our roadside techs reach you in under 30 minutes with the right jack, tools, and patches. Licensed and insured, USDOT certified, Hablamos Español. Flat-rate pricing — no hidden fees on the highway. We work passenger vehicles, RVs, and light commercial trucks 24/7.

faq.a: Typically 20–30 minutes on-site once we arrive.

faq.q: Do I need to have a spare?
faq.a: If you have one, we'll mount it. If not, we can plug or swap depending on damage.
Yes — light trailer tires included. Heavy-duty trailer tires fall under truck repair pricing.

services.title: Battery Jump Start
services.shortDesc: Dead battery? On-site jump or battery swap, anywhere in the Texas Panhandle.
services.longDesc: Dead battery jumpstart near you in Amarillo, TX. Average response under 25 minutes. We bring commercial-grade jump packs, can test your alternator on the spot, and carry replacement batteries for most makes. Licensed and insured. Hablamos Español. Flat-rate pricing.

faq.a: If the battery is bad, no — but we can swap on the spot.
Yes, common GM/Ford/Toyota/Honda sizes are on the truck.

services.title: Car Lockout Service
services.shortDesc: Locked keys in the car? Non-damaging entry, no membership needed.
services.longDesc: Locked out of car in Amarillo? Our techs use professional non-damaging entry tools — slim jims, air wedges, lockout kits. We handle key fob programming and push-button start vehicles. Average arrival under 25 minutes. Hablamos Español, no membership required.

faq.a: No — we use professional non-damaging entry tools.

faq.q: Do you do key fob programming?
faq.a: Yes, on most modern makes.

services.title: Fuel Delivery
services.shortDesc: Ran out of gas? Up to 5 gallons brought to you anywhere on I-40.
services.longDesc: Ran out of gas on I-40 in the Texas Panhandle? We deliver gasoline or diesel directly to your vehicle, anywhere in our service area. Flat-rate dispatch fee + cost of fuel. No membership needed. Hablamos Español.

faq.q: How much fuel do you bring?
faq.a: Up to 5 gallons — enough to get you to the next station.
Yes — gasoline and diesel both.

services.title: Winch-Out & Recovery
services.shortDesc: Stuck in mud, snow, or a ditch? On-site winch-out, no damage.
services.longDesc: Stuck in mud, snow, sand, or off the highway? Our winch trucks run heavy-duty cable rated for cars, light trucks, and trailers. Recovery without damaging your suspension or undercarriage. 24/7 dispatch across the Texas Panhandle.

faq.a: No — we use rated straps and pull from factory recovery points.
Yes, when safe to access. Heavy off-road may need our rotator.

services.title: Light-Duty Towing
services.shortDesc: Cars, SUVs & light trucks. Flatbed available, GPS-tracked dispatch.
services.longDesc: 24/7 light-duty towing in Amarillo and across the Texas Panhandle. We tow passenger cars, SUVs, and light pickups on flatbed or wheel-lift. Licensed and insured, GPS-tracked. Flat-rate pricing per mile, no hidden fees.

faq.a: Yes — recommended for AWD and luxury vehicles.
100 miles around Amarillo, including Tucumcari NM.

services.title: Heavy-Duty Towing
services.shortDesc: Semi trucks, RVs, buses, box trucks. 75-ton rotator service available.
services.longDesc: Heavy-duty towing Amarillo TX — semi trucks, tractor-trailers, RVs, buses, and large box trucks on the I-40 corridor. We operate a 75-ton rotator for accident recovery, jackknife, and rollover. USDOT certified, fully bonded.

faq.a: Yes — 75-ton rotator on standby for I-40 accidents.
Yes — most major commercial carriers.

services.title: Long-Distance Towing
services.shortDesc: Out-of-state and cross-Texas tows. Quoted flat rate, GPS tracked.
services.longDesc: Long-distance towing from Amarillo to anywhere in TX, NM, OK, KS, or CO. Quoted flat rate up front — no surprise per-mile bills. GPS-tracked, fully bonded, signed bill of lading.

faq.a: Anywhere in the lower 48 if quoted ahead.

faq.q: Do you do classic / luxury cars?
faq.a: Yes — enclosed transport on request.

services.title: Semi Truck Repair (On-Site)
services.shortDesc: Mobile diesel mechanic for tractor-trailers anywhere on I-40.
services.longDesc: Semi truck repair Amarillo Texas — mobile diesel mechanic dispatched to your breakdown location on I-40, I-27, or US-87. We carry common parts for Cummins, Detroit, Volvo, Cat, and Paccar. ASE certified, USDOT compliant. Air brake repair, DPF regen, DEF problems, alternator, starter, and fuel system on-road.

faq.q: What engines do you work on?
faq.a: Cummins, Detroit, Volvo, Cat, Paccar — most Class 8 platforms.

faq.q: Do you do DPF regen on the road?
faq.a: Yes — forced regen and parametric resets on-site.

services.title: Mobile Diesel Mechanic
services.shortDesc: ASE-certified diesel tech, on the road in under 1 hour anywhere on I-40.
services.longDesc: Mobile diesel mechanic Amarillo serving the entire Texas Panhandle and I-40 corridor. We come to your truck, RV, or fleet — whether you're at a truck stop, on the shoulder, or at your yard. 24-hour mobile mechanic, no membership required. Hablamos Español.

faq.q: Do you have engine codes diagnostic tools?
faq.a: Yes — Cummins INSITE, Detroit DDDL, Cat ET on the truck.
Yes — Class A, B, and C diesel pushers.

services.title: Trailer Repair
services.shortDesc: Air leaks, brake chambers, lights, kingpins. On-site trailer service.
services.longDesc: Trailer repair on the road in Amarillo & Texas Panhandle. Air leak air brake repair, brake chambers, slack adjusters, ABS sensors, light wiring, kingpin checks. DOT compliance work and roadside trailer tire blowout repair on I-40.

faq.q: Do you do DOT inspections roadside?
faq.a: Yes — annual + repair work to bring you to compliance.
Yes — heavy trailer tire dispatch service.

services.title: Air Brake Repair (On-Road)
services.shortDesc: Air leaks, slack adjusters, brake chambers, ABS faults — on-site.
services.longDesc: Air brake repair on the road in Amarillo. We diagnose air leaks, replace slack adjusters and brake chambers, repair ABS sensor faults, and test compressor governor pressure on-site. Critical for DOT compliance — we get you safe and legal.

faq.q: Can you fix it at the truck stop?
faq.a: Yes — most air brake repairs are mobile-friendly.

services.title: DPF Regen Service
services.shortDesc: Forced DPF regen, parametric resets, DEF system on-site.
services.longDesc: DPF regen service in Amarillo & on I-40. We perform forced regens, parametric resets, and DEF system diagnostics on-site. We carry common DPF/DOC sensors and can flag bad NOx sensors. Get you back on the road without a tow.

faq.q: Will a forced regen fix me?
faq.a: Most of the time — if the filter is over 100% loaded, you may need a baking service.

howItWorks.title: 1. Call or Text
howItWorks.desc: Tell us your location, vehicle, and the issue. Average call-to-dispatch under 60 seconds.

howItWorks.title: 2. We Dispatch + GPS
howItWorks.desc: We text you a live GPS tracking link so you see your tech's exact ETA on the way.

howItWorks.title: 3. We Fix It
howItWorks.desc: Average arrival 22 min in Amarillo, under 45 min anywhere on I-40 in our service area.

about.title: Local Operators. Highway Specialists.
about.p1: Panhandle 24/7 Roadside is a locally owned, USDOT-certified roadside and mobile mechanic operation based in Amarillo, TX. We patrol the I-40 corridor 24 hours a day — from Adrian to Shamrock — with light-duty wreckers, heavy-duty rotators, and ASE-certified mobile diesel techs.
about.p2: We don't sell memberships. We don't hide pricing. You get a flat rate before we start work, GPS tracking on every dispatch, and a tech who answers the phone in under a minute. Hablamos Español. That's the whole pitch.

reviews.author: Mike T.
reviews.text: Blown tire at mile marker 78 on I-40 at 11pm. Called these guys and they were on scene in 19 minutes. No BS, no hidden fees, just got me back on the road. Best in the Panhandle.

reviews.author: Carlos R.
reviews.text: Diesel quit on me at Exit 60. Called Panhandle 24/7 — mechanic showed up in 38 minutes with the part on the truck. Saved me a $1,200 tow.

reviews.author: Kim L.
reviews.text: Locked my keys in the car at WT campus. They came out, no damage, no membership BS. $75 flat. Done in 22 min.

reviews.author: Dale H.
reviews.text: Battery died at the truck stop in Pampa. They jumped me, tested the alternator, and sold me a new battery on the spot at a fair price. Real pros.

reviews.author: Jorge M.
reviews.text: Trailer tire blowout at Exit 152 westbound. Got us rolling in under an hour. Direct billed our company. Solid outfit.

reviews.author: Tom B.
reviews.text: Stuck in mud after a wrong turn. Their winch truck pulled me out without a scratch. Hablamos Español was a bonus for my passenger.

fleet.title: Fleet & Commercial Accounts
fleet.subtitle: NET-30 billing. Direct insurance bill. Priority dispatch.
fleet.body: We work with trucking companies, delivery fleets, and insurance carriers across the Texas Panhandle. Open a commercial account for NET-30 invoicing, direct bill to most major insurance carriers, dedicated dispatch line, priority response on I-40, and monthly fleet reports.

pages.title: About Panhandle 24/7 Roadside
pages.metaDescription: Locally owned, USDOT-certified roadside and mobile mechanic operation in Amarillo, TX. Texas Panhandle's I-40 specialists.

blocks.content: Local Operators. Highway Specialists.

Panhandle 24/7 Roadside is a locally owned, USDOT-certified roadside and mobile mechanic operation based in Amarillo, TX. We patrol the I-40 corridor 24 hours a day — from Adrian to Shamrock — with light-duty wreckers, heavy-duty rotators, and ASE-certified mobile diesel techs.
Why Drivers Call Us First
Flat-rate pricing — you know the cost before we start. GPS tracking on every dispatch. ASE certified. Hablamos Español. No memberships, no hidden fees.

pages.title: Contact Panhandle 24/7 Roadside
pages.metaDescription: Call (806) 555-0140 for 24/7 roadside dispatch in Amarillo & I-40. Service request form, address, hours.

blocks.content: Contact Dispatch — 24/7
Phone: (806) 555-0140  •  Text: (806) 555-0140  •  Email: dispatch@panhandle247roadside.com  •  Hours: 24/7  •  Address: 4500 I-40 Access Rd, Amarillo, TX 79103
Submit a Dispatch Request
If you're stranded, calling is fastest. If you're scheduling ahead or asking a question, use the form on the homepage or this number.

pages.title: Transparent Pricing
pages.metaDescription: Flat-rate pricing for towing, jump start, lockout, fuel delivery, winch-out, mobile mechanic. No memberships, no surprise bills.

blocks.content: Transparent Flat-Rate Pricing
Every service has a flat rate quoted before we start. No memberships. No surprise bills. Below is our standard rate sheet — actual quote depends on vehicle class, distance, and parts cost.
Roadside Assistance
Flat tire change — $75  •  Battery jump start — $65  •  Car lockout — $75  •  Fuel delivery — $55 + fuel  •  Winch-out (light) — $125
Towing Services
Light-duty hookup (within 5 mi) — $95  •  Per-mile after 5 mi — $3.50  •  Heavy-duty hookup — $385  •  Heavy per-mile — $8.50  •  Rotator — quoted
Mobile Mechanic & Truck Repair
Service call (first hour) — $185  •  Hourly labor (after) — $145/hr  •  Forced DPF regen — $285  •  Parts — at cost, no markup games

blocks.content: Our Service Area — 100 Miles Around Amarillo

We serve the entire Texas Panhandle and into eastern New Mexico, with primary focus on the I-40 corridor from Adrian, TX to Shamrock, TX. 24/7 dispatch, average arrival under 45 min anywhere in the service area.
Cities We Serve
Amarillo • Canyon • Hereford • Dumas • Pampa • Borger • Stratford • Spearman • Vega • Groom • Shamrock • Wellington • Claude • Panhandle TX • Tucumcari NM
Highway Corridors We Patrol
I-40 (mile markers 22 to 152) • I-27 • US-87 • US-287 • US-60 • Loop 335

blocks.content: Fleet & Commercial Accounts

Account Benefits

Open an Account
